title: Classify shapes by line and angle types
description: Classify shapes based on pictures or attributes, such as angle types and side-lengths.
topic_path: Classify shapes by line and angle types

assessment_items.question_content:
The following clues will help us identify a shape:

* The shape is a quadrilateral.  
* The shape has $2$ pairs of sides of equal length.  
* The shape has $4$ right angles.

**Which shape matches all three clues?**  

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
###Hint 1: The shape is a quadrilateral.

A quadrilateral is a polygon with $4$ sides.

These shapes are quadrilaterals:

[[☃ image 1]]

[[☃ image 2]]

[[☃ image 3]]

###Hint 2: The shape has $2$ pairs of sides of equal length.

These shapes are quadrilaterals and have $2$ pairs of equal side lengths:

[[☃ image 1]]

[[☃ image 2]]

###Hint 3: The shape has $4$ right angles.

This shape is a quadrilateral, has $2$ pairs of equal side lengths and has $4$ right angles:


[[☃ image 1]]

This shape matches all three clues:  


[[☃ image 1]]

choices.content: ![A shape with four sides measuring 3 meters, 4 meters, 6 meters, and 5 meters. The shape has one set of parallel sides and has two right angles.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/6f95f8b28057fc8c1cfb6b75b5fb6be1c32ccae5)

![A shape with four sides measuring 4 centimeters, 4 centimeters, 6 centimeters, and 6 centimeters. The shape does not have any sides that are parallel and has two right angles.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/18e9860554bcbd1fd000ec0703714dd15ecdcdbd)

![A shape with four sides measuring 5 meters, 5 meters, 8 meters, and 8 meters. The shape has two sets of parallel sides and has four right angles.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b9a6990ffbb24800203298f0101601c98478f2b6)

assessment_items.question_content:
The following clues will help us identify a shape:

* The shape has at least one pair of parallel sides.  
* The shape is a quadrilateral.   
* The shape has no right angles.  

**Which shape matches all three clues?**  

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
###Hint 1:  The shape has at least one pair of parallel sides.  

These shapes have **at least** one pair of parallel sides.


[[☃ image 2]]
[[☃ image 3]]

###Hint 2: The shape is a quadrilateral.

A quadrilateral is a polygon with $4$ sides.

These shapes have at least one pair of parallel sides and are quadrilaterals:

[[☃ image 1]]

[[☃ image 2]]

###Hint 3: The shape has no right angles.  

This shape has two pairs of parallel sides, is a quadrilateral, and has no right angles:

[[☃ image 1]]
This shape matches all three clues:  

[[☃ image 1]]

choices.content: ![A shape with four sides measuring 5 meters, 5 meters, 9 meters, and 9 meters. The shape has two sets of parallel sides and does not have right angles.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/f4a87cd6056fac25ffb650cc820a368f7f7d0008)

![A shape with five sides of equal length each measuring 5 meters. The shape does not have any sides that are parallel and does not have any right angles.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/cb91d1709724ef421c1ef2acc049d72840ebd28b)

![A shape with four sides measuring 10 meters, 10 meters, 8 meters, and 8 meters. The shape has two sets of parallel sides and has four right angles.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/c84ac9017423dac604ff6ca09b291ea2adf71b0d)

assessment_items.question_content:
The following clues will help us identify a shape:

* The shape is a quadrilateral.   
* The shape has no right angles.  
* The shape has $4$ sides of equal length.

**Which shape matches all three clues?**  

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
###Hint 1: The shape is a quadrilateral.

A quadrilateral is a polygon with $4$ sides.

These shapes are quadrilaterals:


[[☃ image 1]]


[[☃ image 2]]

 
[[☃ image 3]]

###Hint 2: The shape has no right angles.  

These shapes are quadrilaterals with no right angles:



[[☃ image 1]]


[[☃ image 2]]

###Hint 3: The shape has $4$ sides of equal length.

This shape is a quadrilateral, has no right angles, and has $4$ sides of equal length:



[[☃ image 1]]

This shape matches all three clues:  



[[☃ image 1]]

choices.content: ![A quadrilateral with side lengths of 4 meters, 6 meters, 5 meters, and 3 meters. The shape has  2 right angles. ](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/6f95f8b28057fc8c1cfb6b75b5fb6be1c32ccae5)
![A quadrilateral with each side measuring 6 meters. The shape does not have right angles.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/68f6078ee5d073af44ada72214404c1616129188)
![A quadrilateral with side lengths of 5 meters, 9 meters, 5 meters, and 9 meters. The shape does not have right angles.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/f4a87cd6056fac25ffb650cc820a368f7f7d0008)

assessment_items.question_content:
The following clues will help us identify a shape:

* The shape is a quadrilateral.     
* The shape does not have $4$ right angles.  
* The shape has only $1$ pair of parallel sides.  

**Which shape matches all three clues?**  


[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
###Hint 1: The shape is a quadrilateral.

A quadrilateral is a polygon with $4$ sides.

These shapes are quadrilaterals:

[[☃ image 2]]
[[☃ image 3]]
###Hint 2: The shape does not have $4$ right angles.  

These shapes are quadrilateral and do not have $4$ right angles:

[[☃ image 1]]
[[☃ image 2]]

###Hint 3: The shape has only $1$ pair of parallel sides. 

This shape is a quadrilateral, does not have $4$ right angles, and has only $1$ pair of parallel sides:


[[☃ image 1]]

This shape matches all three clues:  


[[☃ image 1]]

choices.content: ![A shape with three sides of equal length each measuring 4 meters. The shape does not have any sides that are parallel and does not have right angles.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/cfb1c299763d532dd861ae13e48f1b40390a8dc9)

![A shape with four sides measuring 4 meters, 6 meters, 6 meters, and 7 meters. The shape has one set of parallel sides and does not have right angles.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b787d821b97c96663f4705e1d0a24974086f64b2)

![A shape with four sides measuring 5 meters, 5 meters, 9 meters, and 9 meters. The shape has two sets of parallel sides and does not have right angles.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/f4a87cd6056fac25ffb650cc820a368f7f7d0008)

assessment_items.question_content:
The following clues will help us identify a shape:

* All sides have equal length.  
* All angles have equal measure.  
* The shape has no right angles.  

**Which shape matches all three clues?**  

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
###Hint 1: All sides have equal length.  

These shapes have equal side lengths:


[[☃ image 1]]
[[☃ image 2]]
[[☃ image 3]]

###Hint 2: All angles have equal measure. 

These shapes have equal side lengths and equal angle measures:

[[☃ image 1]]
[[☃ image 2]]

###Hint 3: The shape has no right angles. 

This shape has equal side lengths, equal angle measures, and no right angles:

[[☃ image 1]]

This shape matches all three clues:  

[[☃ image 1]]

choices.content: ![A shape with four sides of equal length each measuring 6 meters. The shape has two sets of parallel sides and does not have any right angles.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/68f6078ee5d073af44ada72214404c1616129188)

![A shape with four sides of equal length each measuring 7 meters. The shape has two sets of parallel sides and has four right angles.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/047c1bc9141426f3528ab7d512412a45b4b91c5f)

![A shape with six sides of equal length each measuring 8 meters. The shape has three sets of parallel sides and does not have right angles. The shape has 6 equal angle measures.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/7bafef6ae5b6d269db74ef8e77f6cb9972339ef5)

assessment_items.question_content:
The following clues will help us identify a shape:

* The shape has no right angles.  
* The shape has no pairs of sides of equal length.  
* The shape is not a triangle.  

**Which shape matches all three clues?**  

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
###Hint 1: The shape has no right angles.  

These shapes have no right angles.  

[[☃ image 1]]
[[☃ image 2]]
[[☃ image 3]]

###Hint 2: The shape has no pairs of sides of equal length.  

These shapes have no right angles and no pairs of equal side lengths.  

[[☃ image 1]]

[[☃ image 2]]

###Hint 3: The shape is not a triangle.  

This shape has no right angles, no pairs of equal side lengths, and is not a triangle.  

[[☃ image 1]]

This shape matches all three clues:  


[[☃ image 1]]

choices.content: ![A shape with eight sides of equal length each measuring 4 meters. The shape has four sets of parallel sides and does not have right angles.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/bc9327fc94a9788fd74abc5004057bafee2e15ed)

![A shape with three sides measuring 6 meters, 8 meters, and 9 meters. The shape does not have any sides that are parallel and does not have any right angles.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/ca3b5b2bfa57f59c9e9789623e24345805b1543a)
![A round shape does not have any sides that are parallel and does not have any right angles.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/9bf34a29bc62816f07057d9e571de844df484cd9)

assessment_items.question_content:
The following clues will help us identify a shape:

* The shape is a quadrilateral.  
* All angles are right angles.  
* All sides have equal length.  

**Which shape matches all three clues?**  

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
###Hint 1: The shape is a quadrilateral.

A quadrilateral is a polygon with $4$ sides.

These shapes are quadrilaterals:

[[☃ image 1]]
[[☃ image 2]]

###Hint 2: All angles are right angles.

This shape is a quadrilateral and has all right angles:

[[☃ image 1]]

###Hint 3: All sides have equal length.  

This shape is a quadrilateral, has all right angles, and all sides have equal lengths:

[[☃ image 1]]

This shape matches all three clues:  


[[☃ image 1]]

choices.content: ![A shape with eight sides of equal length each measuring 2 meters. The shape has four sets of parallel sides and does not have right angles.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/312b51e37b54e6e6587f630af598d617bc4a356a)

![A shape with four sides of equal length each measuring 6 meters. The shape has two sets of parallel sides and does not have right angles.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/68f6078ee5d073af44ada72214404c1616129188)

![A shape with four sides of equal length each measuring 3 meters. The shape has two sets of parallel sides and has four right angles.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/86dda436ca8d8b48d38469f39674254f87a2ae3a)

assessment_items.question_content:

* The shape has $2$ pairs of sides of equal length.  
* The shape is a quadrilateral.  
* The shape does not have $4$ right angles.  

**Which shape matches all three clues?**  

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
###Hint 1: The shape has $2$ pairs of sides of equal length.  

These shapes have $2$ pairs of equal side lengths:


[[☃ image 1]]
[[☃ image 2]]
[[☃ image 3]]

###Hint 2: The shape is a quadrilateral.

A quadrilateral is a polygon with $4$ sides.

These shapes are quadrilaterals and have $2$ pairs of equal side lengths:

[[☃ image 1]]
[[☃ image 2]]
[[☃ image 3]]

###Hint 3: The shape does not have $4$ right angles.

This shape is a quadrilateral, has $2$ pairs of equal side lengths, and does not have a $4$ right angles:

[[☃ image 1]]

This shape matches all three clues:  

[[☃ image 1]]

choices.content: ![A shape with four sides of equal length each measuring 3 meters. The shape has two sets of parallel sides and has four right angles.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/86dda436ca8d8b48d38469f39674254f87a2ae3a)

![A shape with four sides measuring 5 meters, 5 meters, 8 meters, and 8 meters. The shape has two sets of parallel sides and has four right angles.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b9a6990ffbb24800203298f0101601c98478f2b6)

![A shape with four sides measuring 4 centimeters, 4 centimeters, 6 centimeters, and 6 centimeters. The shape does not have any sides that are parallel and has two right angles.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/18e9860554bcbd1fd000ec0703714dd15ecdcdbd)

assessment_items.question_content:
Bella sorted shapes in two groups.

Group A | Group B
- | - | -
![A shape with four sides measuring 3 meters, 4 meters, 6 meters, and 5 meters. The shape has one set of parallel sides and has two right angles.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/6f95f8b28057fc8c1cfb6b75b5fb6be1c32ccae5) | ![A round shape does not have any sides that are parallel and does not have any right angles.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/9bf34a29bc62816f07057d9e571de844df484cd9)
![A shape with four sides measuring 4 centimeters, 4 centimeters, 6 centimeters, and 6 centimeters. The shape does not have any sides that are parallel and has two right angles.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/18e9860554bcbd1fd000ec0703714dd15ecdcdbd) | ![A shape with three sides measuring 6 meters, 8 meters, and 9 meters. The shape does not have any sides that are parallel and does not have any right angles.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/ca3b5b2bfa57f59c9e9789623e24345805b1543a)
![A shape with four sides of equal length each measuring 6 meters. The shape has two sets of parallel sides and does not have any right angles.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/68f6078ee5d073af44ada72214404c1616129188) | ![A shape with eight sides of equal length each measuring 2 meters. The shape has four sets of parallel sides and does not have any right angles.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/312b51e37b54e6e6587f630af598d617bc4a356a)

**Which of these rules did Bella use to sort the shapes?**  

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
Equilateral shapes have all sides of equal length.

Quadrilaterals are polygons with $4$ sides.

###Equilateral shapes

These shapes from group A are *not* equilateral.

[[☃ image 1]]
[[☃ image 2]]

###Quadrilaterals

Group A has all quadrilaterals, and Group B has no quadrilaterals.

choices.content: All shapes in Group A are equilateral, but no shapes in the Group B are equilateral.
All shapes in Group A are quadrilaterals, but no shapes in Group B are quadrilaterals.

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
Parallel lines always remain the same distance apart and therefore never intersect, like the pair of lines below. 

[[☃ image 1]]

Quadrilaterals are polygons with $4$ sides.

###Parallel lines

This shape from Group B has parallel sides:

[[☃ image 2]]

###Quadrilaterals

Group A has all quadrilaterals, and Group B has no quadrilaterals.

choices.content: All shapes in Group A have a pair of parallel sides and no shapes in Group B have a pair of parallel sides.
All shapes in Group A are quadrilaterals, but no shapes in Group B are quadrilaterals.

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
Parallel lines always remain the same distance apart and therefore never intersect, like the pair of lines below.

[[☃ image 1]]

A right angle is in the shape of a perfect corner, like the corner of a typical sheet of paper.

###Right angles 

These shapes from Group A do **not** have right angles.

[[☃ image 1]]
[[☃ image 2]]

###Parallel lines

All shapes in Group A have a pair of parallel sides, but no shapes in Group B have a pair of parallel sides.

choices.content: All shapes in Group A have a pair of parallel sides, but no shapes in Group B have a pair of parallel sides.
All shapes in Group A have a right angle, but no shapes in Group B have a right angle.
